# OMG CLI Adapter Quick Reference

## 🎯 Core Integration Points

### Canonical Hosts

| :--- | :--- |

| codex | `~/.codex/config.toml` |
| gemini | `~/.gemini/settings.json` |
| kimi | `~/.kimi/mcp.json` |

### Quick Commands

| Task | Command |
| :--- | :--- |
| Setup | `/OMG:setup` |
| Browser | `/OMG:browser <goal>` |
| Crazy Mode | `/OMG:crazy <goal>` |
| Deep Plan | `/OMG:deep-plan <goal>` |
